projects.title: Elm Street Bioswale Installation
projects.description: Design and install a bioswale drainage system at the Elm Street underpass to manage stormwater runoff, reduce flood frequency, and create a green corridor along the carriageway. The project is working with the council highways team to obtain consent-to-excavate before breaking ground.

projects.title: Council Drainage Liaison Protocol
projects.description: Establish a formal, documented process for reporting drainage faults to Eastshire Council — including how to log faults, track responses, cite previous report references, and escalate to the Environment Agency when the council does not respond within agreed timelines.

projects.title: Pine Avenue Clearance & Interim Stewardship
projects.description: Organise a community clearance of the fly-tip at 14 Pine Avenue and establish an interim land stewardship arrangement with the landowner to prevent the site from becoming a dump again. Initial contact with the landowner has been made via the council's vacant land register.

projects.title: Eastshire Vacant Land Inventory
projects.description: Map and document all identifiable vacant lots in Eastshire, recording ownership via land registry searches, site condition, and potential community uses. Output will be a publicly accessible map and data set.

projects.title: Rooftop Growing Spaces Survey
projects.description: Survey commercial and community buildings across the district for structural suitability and owner willingness to host rooftop growing spaces. Produce a prioritised list of sites with contact details and load-bearing data.

projects.title: Seed Library Digitisation
projects.description: Digitise the Eastshire Seed Library catalogue — currently held in paper ledgers — and make it searchable online, enabling distributed seed-saving coordination and improved community access to heritage varieties.

projects.title: Safe Routes to School Audit
projects.description: Audit and document cycle route safety on all major school corridors in Eastshire during term time, producing a prioritised list of hazards with photographic evidence and a recommended schedule of interventions.

projects.title: Cycle Repair Station Network
projects.description: Identify suitable locations, negotiate permissions, install, and maintain a network of publicly accessible cycle repair stations at key points across the district, starting with the town centre, station approach, and main school corridors.
